paragraph: The single-family market in Waldwick is a real seller's market. With a median sale price of $652,500 and a sale-to-list ratio of 1.06, homes are closing above asking over 80 percent of the time and moving fast at a median of 13 days on market. Sellers can expect competitive bidding on well-priced inventory. Condo and townhouse activity is lighter at six sales over seven months with a median of $554,950, but these properties are also selling above asking and moving quickly at a median of 18.5 days on market. Multi-family homes sit at $1,025,000 median with only four sales in the period, suggesting sparse inventory in this category and longer time on market at 26 days. If you're looking in Waldwick, the single-family tier is where the volume and momentum are. Prices are firm and inventory moves without sitting. Condos and townhouses offer a lower price entry point, though selection is limited. Multi-family is a niche category with minimal activity.
